text: Under SOLAS and the FSS Code, what is the general requirement for fire detection and alarm system initialization?

options.text: Audible and visual alarms must initiate directly on the Navigation Bridge and Cargo Control Room (CCR)
Alarms should only sound in the galley area
Alarms must be visible only inside the engine workshop
Only a text notification to the Chief Engineer's cabin is required

explanation: SOLAS and FSS Code requirements stipulate that fire alarms must alert the bridge and the engine control room, as these locations are manned 24/7. This ensures immediate notification and response to any fire detection signal.
